videos.headline: WSU's Kyle Williams catches deflected ball for incredible TD
videos.description: Washington State QB John Mateer throws into the end zone, where the ball bounces off a defender's arm and into the hands of Kyle Williams for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (WSU's Kyle Williams catches deflected ball for incredible TD) 2024/09/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Wayshawn Parker breaks free for 43-yard Washington State TD
videos.description: Washington State RB Wayshawn Parker takes the handoff and sprints 43 yards to the end zone for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Wayshawn Parker breaks free for 43-yard Washington State TD) 2024/09/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam'Ron Valdez catches pass for a Texas Tech TD
videos.description: Texas Tech QB Coy Eakin lobs it to Cam'Rom Valdez, who makes the grab and gets into the end zone for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam'Ron Valdez catches pass for a Texas Tech TD) 2024/09/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Djouvensky Schlenbaker muscles in for Washinton State TD
videos.description: Washington State RB Djouvensky Schlenbaker scores on a short run to widen the Cougars' lead over Texas Tech.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Djouvensky Schlenbaker muscles in for Washinton State TD) 2024/09/08 ESHEET
